use_codes.desc: FOR TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH PROSTATE-SPECIFIC MEMBRANE ANTIGEN (PSMA)-POSITIVE METASTATIC CASTRATION-RESISTANT PROSTATE CANCER (MCRPC) WHO HAVE BEEN TREATED WITH ANDROGEN RECEPTOR (AR) PATHWAY INHIBITION AND TAXANE-BASED CHEMOTHERAPY
